author: Rugved Katkade
name: 12L/768D + INT6/LZMA + BigramHash + U-Net Skips
blurb: Optimized 57M parameter model for the 16MB track. INT6 quantization + LZMA-9 compression allows for 12 layers at 768 width. Features BigramHash(3072) and U-Net style residual connections for enhanced local/global context at zero parameter cost. Optimized with Parallel Muon.
technique_summary: 12L/768D + INT6/LZMA + BigramHash + U-Net Skips + Parallel Muon
